title: Spec → Plan → Implementation
trigger: The request is vague or multi-step.
goal: Turn a fuzzy idea into a spec, plan, and implementation checklist.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Parallel Agent Development
trigger: Multiple independent tasks can run at once.
goal: Split work safely and integrate results.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Root-Cause Debugging
trigger: A bug is unclear or recurring.
goal: Reproduce, isolate, fix, and verify root cause.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Fresh-Context Code Review
trigger: Before merging or trusting agent-authored code.
goal: Review without author-context contamination.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Security Review Sprint
trigger: Code touches auth, secrets, network, parsers, permissions, or public release.
goal: Find reachable issues with evidence and false-positive notes.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Browser Runtime QA
trigger: A browser app, page, or automation flow needs validation.
goal: Verify real runtime behavior, console, network, and accessibility where relevant.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Release Runbook
trigger: A change is ready to publish, deploy, or announce.
goal: Stage rollout with readiness evidence and rollback criteria.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Research Brief
trigger: A decision depends on current facts or external sources.
goal: Produce a source-backed recommendation and uncertainty list.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Local AI Stack Setup
trigger: A local or self-hosted AI stack is needed.
goal: Install and verify a private/local agent stack safely.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Repo Growth Launch
trigger: A public repository needs useful packaging and launch readiness.
goal: Make a repo discoverable without fake engagement or spam.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Change Impact Map
trigger: Before an agent edits unfamiliar code or a risky area.
goal: Map the blast radius before implementation starts.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Agent Task Contract and Scope Box
trigger: Before delegating a task to an AI agent.
goal: Give the agent a contract that prevents drive-by edits and unsupported success claims.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Regression-Test-First Bug Fix
trigger: A bug has a concrete symptom or user report.
goal: Capture the bug as a failing test before changing production code.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Minimized Reproducer Factory
trigger: A bug is vague, flaky, environment-specific, or reported only in logs.
goal: Turn a symptom into the smallest runnable reproduction.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Golden Master Refactor
trigger: Refactoring legacy or under-tested code where behavior must stay stable.
goal: Lock current behavior with characterization tests before changing structure.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Agent Patch Intake Triage
trigger: An agent returns a diff, branch, patch, or pull request.
goal: Separate useful changes from scope creep before deeper review.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Review Feedback Application Loop
trigger: A reviewer left comments on an agent-authored PR.
goal: Classify feedback, apply minimal fixes, and verify each resolved thread.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: API Contract Change Lockstep
trigger: Changing public APIs, schemas, events, CLI flags, or config formats.
goal: Update producers, consumers, docs, fixtures, and contract tests together.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: CI Red-to-Green Reproducer
trigger: CI fails after an agent change.
goal: Reproduce or explain CI failure before pushing fixes.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Flaky Test Burn-Down
trigger: A test passes on rerun but fails intermittently.
goal: Capture nondeterminism and fix the root cause instead of rerunning to green.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Dependency Upgrade Shepherd
trigger: Bumping libraries, frameworks, runtimes, lockfiles, or build tools.
goal: Upgrade with changelog context, tests, and rollback notes.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Urgent Hotfix Fast Path
trigger: A production-impacting regression needs a fast patch.
goal: Constrain work to reproduce, fix, smoke, and decide rollback or roll-forward.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Incident Command Center
trigger: A pager alert, customer-impacting incident, or severe degradation is active.
goal: Assemble evidence, owners, mitigations, and status updates without letting the agent take unsafe action.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Blameless Postmortem and Action Ledger
trigger: An incident is stabilized or closed.
goal: Produce an evidence-backed timeline, contributing factors, and follow-up ledger.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Migration Readiness and Cutover Planner
trigger: A schema, API, platform, vendor, or data migration is proposed.
goal: Plan phases, dual-run checks, canaries, rollback, and go/no-go criteria.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Documentation Drift Audit
trigger: Docs may be stale after feature, process, or dependency changes.
goal: Compare docs against source behavior and fix contradictions with evidence.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: ADR Decision Capture from Threads
trigger: A decision happened in chat, meeting notes, issue comments, or PR discussion.
goal: Convert messy discussion into context, options, decision, consequences, and owners.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Role-Based Onboarding Trail
trigger: A new hire, transfer, contractor, or agent needs to ramp into a repo or system.
goal: Create a role-specific path with starter tasks and verification checkpoints.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Knowledge Transfer and Bus-Factor Reduction
trigger: A system depends on one person, a rotation is coming, or ownership is changing.
goal: Create ownership maps, runbooks, glossary, and a Q&A backlog.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Workflow Evaluation Harness
trigger: A new agent workflow, prompt, or automation needs repeatable quality checks.
goal: Define golden tasks, rubric, thresholds, and regression checks.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Prompt and Policy Change Control
trigger: Changing system prompts, guardrails, tool permissions, routing, or memory policy.
goal: Review intent, risk, before-after behavior, rollout, and rollback.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Agent Memory Hygiene Review
trigger: Memory feels wrong, stale, conflicting, too full, or privacy-sensitive.
goal: Deduplicate, expire, redact, and scope memories without losing useful preferences.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Customer Signal to Roadmap Triage
trigger: Support tickets, interviews, reviews, sales notes, or churn reasons accumulate.
goal: Cluster evidence into themes, impact, and candidate roadmap items.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Multi-Repo Change Coordinator
trigger: A change spans multiple repositories, packages, services, docs, or deployment units.
goal: Sequence changes, compatibility shims, branch/PR mapping, and verification across repos.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Git Worktree Agent Lanes
trigger: Multiple agents or humans need to work in the same repo concurrently.
goal: Use worktrees and branch naming to isolate lanes and avoid stomping shared state.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Context Compaction and Handoff
trigger: A long agent session is about to compact, hand off, or restart.
goal: Preserve the minimum operational state needed for the next agent to continue safely.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: MCP and Tool Integration Review
trigger: Adding or changing an MCP server, tool, plugin, or external integration.
goal: Review permissions, data flow, failure modes, and least-privilege configuration.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Secrets and Config Audit
trigger: Before public release, CI setup, deployment, or repository handoff.
goal: Find exposed secrets, unsafe defaults, config drift, and docs that request secrets insecurely.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Agent-Written Docs Review
trigger: An agent produced README, API docs, changelog, tutorial, or launch copy.
goal: Check claims, dependency order, examples, and stale or exaggerated statements.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Long-Running Task Checkpoint
trigger: A build, migration, scrape, benchmark, agent run, or batch job will run for a while.
goal: Track progress, logs, exit conditions, and recovery without losing the process.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record command/output evidence before claiming success.

title: Agent-Generated Test Review
trigger: An agent added tests, and coverage quality needs review before trusting the patch.
goal: Accept tests that protect real behavior and reject tests that only verify mocks, implementation details, or unproven assumptions.
verification: Run the workflow checklist and record red/green or mutation evidence plus test command output before claiming coverage is adequate.
